hero.title:
Where moments
matter.
hero.subtitle: A historic gem on the banks of the Black Drim River, Struga.

story.heading: A Legacy on the River
story.p1: Nestled on the picturesque quay of the Black Drim River in Struga, Pizzeria Angela has been a beacon of warmth and exceptional cuisine since 2002.
story.p2: Our cherished building, dating back to 1926, tells its own story through rustic stone walls, a crackling fireplace, and sturdy wooden tables that have hosted generations of families and travelers.
story.p3: We blend the timeless charm of our heritage with a modern culinary vision, crafting pizzas and dishes that honor tradition while embracing innovation. Every meal here is served with a view of the gentle river currents—a reminder that some things, like great food and good company, are timeless.

homePreview.storyText: Our building dates back to 1926. Rustic stone walls, a crackling fireplace, and sturdy wooden tables have hosted generations of families since we opened in 2002.
homePreview.galleryText: From the warmth of our fireplace to the serene views of the Crn Drim River — explore the charm of Angela.
